title: isachne oreades
intro: Isachne oreades, also known as Mountain Muhly, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. Isachne oreades is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of tincture or powder in traditional medicine.
